p.strong: Translating Stack-Based Comparison to x86-64 Register Logic

ol.li: CMP: Performs rax - rcx and updates RFLAGS.
SETCC: If condition (e.g., EQ) is met, sets destination byte to 1, else 0.
MOVZX: Critically important to zero-extend the byte. Without this, the upper bits of rax would remain stale, causing incorrect logic in subsequent 64-bit operations.
